name: Skeleton

traits.name: Languages
traits.text: Understands Common plus one other language but can't speak

text:
# Skeleton

*Medium Undead, Lawful Evil*

Animated bones bound by necromancy to tireless, unquestioning service.

### Actions

**Shortsword.** Melee Attack Roll: +5, reach 5 ft. Hit: 6 (1d6 + 3) Piercing damage.

**Shortbow.** Ranged Attack Roll: +5, range 80/320 ft. Hit: 6 (1d6 + 3) Piercing damage.
